description_long: This is a classic enamel-style cup with a cylindrical body and a slightly flared rim, finished in a vibrant red color. The surface is adorned with a speckled white pattern, reminiscent of vintage camping mugs. The cup features a rounded handle attached to one side, ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior appears to be the same color and pattern as the exterior, suggesting a uniform coating. The cup's material gives it a slightly matte, hard appearance, typical of enamel-coated metal. Its size and shape make it suitable for holding hot or cold beverages in both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A red enamel-style cup with a white speckled pattern and a rounded handle, featuring a slightly flared rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's handle on the right and the full speckled red surface.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and the speckled pattern visible across the back.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, highlighting the cup's cylindrical shape and flared rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle visible, showing the uninterrupted speckled red surface.
